title: SMA framework core
description: First-party identity of the SMA framework itself: layered memory corpus (CORE + per-area index over .claude/memory/), multi-terminal coordination over .sma/ (claims, sessions, push-claims), and the V2 prediction/reflex loop (reflex-check, gates-check, stall-check hook consumers, calibration, report). No daemons, no DB substrate.
